description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image. Define a single stage called deploy and add a job named pages that runs in this stage. In the pages job execute the before_script commands `cd presentation` and `npm install`, then run `npm run deploy` followed by `mv public ../public`; publish the resulting `public/` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and configure the job to run only on the master branch.
